metadata.description: Capable Wealth content-production harness — skills for on-brand financial content for orthopedic surgeons.

plugins.name: capable-wealth
plugins.description: Six skills (generate-batch, validate, linkedin-check, image-brief, voice-check, research-scan) that load the brand context, enforce every production rule, gate quality, and produce on-voice content. Requires the Project/working folder to contain brand/, rules/, src/, outputs/.
